title: Lots Of Tools
description: This mod adds a few tools that might be to your liking.
body:
Lots of Tools is a Minecraft mod for Fabric 1.20.1 with lots of things to play with. This mod REQUIRES Fabric API to work. This mod contains the following:

-Redstone armor & tools,

-Lapis Lazuli armor set & tools,

-Amethyst armor set & tools,

-Copper armor set & tools,

-Emerald armor set & tools,

-Nether Quartz armor set & tools,

-New Angelical Ore, complete with armor & tools,

-New Weh boss, originated from @AngelNaomi on twitch (shoutout to her). For the Weh boss, i suggest having a strong weapon, good armor, food and a ranged tool incase he goes up into the sky. Good luck.
